
## pattern-based predictors {visibility="hidden"}

## intuition: local branch patterns{visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_local-patterns-intuition.qmd >}}

## local pattern based predictor{visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_local-pattern-predict.qmd >}}

## local pattern predictor and collisions{visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_local-and-collision.qmd >}}

## global pattern predictor {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_global-history-predictor.qmd >}}

# combined approaches {visibility="hidden"}

## correlating branch predictor {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_corr-predict.qmd >}}

## mixing predictors {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_mixing-predict.qmd >}}

# specialized predictors {visibility="hidden"}

## loop count predictors {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_loop-count-predict.qmd >}}

# branch predictor performance? {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_bench-results.qmd >}}

# reversed engineering Haswell BP {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /bpred/_re-haswell.qmd >}}
